requirements.requirement: Establish governance framework for algorithmic trading including approval, testing, and monitoring requirements
requirements.rationale: Prevents algorithmic malfunctions and ensures market integrity

requirements.requirement: Implement model risk management for AI/ML applications including bias testing and explainability
requirements.rationale: Ensures AI-driven decisions are fair, accurate, and auditable

requirements.requirement: Implement security and governance controls for DLT and digital asset activities where applicable
requirements.rationale: Addresses unique risks of emerging DLT/digital asset technologies
